resources.string: Lower values improve performance; higher values improve image quality. Changes apply the next time Minecraft starts.
Enter a value from %1$d%% to %2$d%%. 100%% uses the normal screen size.
When enabled, Minecraft uses immersive fullscreen and ignores safe areas like notches and punch-holes.
Adds a small safe inset around the game so important content is less likely to be hidden by rounded phone corners. This cannot change the physical screen shape.
